mapper.sql: id, from_user_id, to_user_id, status, expires_at, resolved_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_friend_request (from_user_id, to_user_id, status, expires_at) VALUES ( #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, 'PENDING', DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), INTERVAL 7 DAY) )
mapper.update: UPDATE social_friend_request SET status = #{status}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE social_friend_request SET status = 'DISMISSED', resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE from_user_id = #{fromPeer} AND to_user_id = #{toPeer} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE social_friend_request SET status = 'EXPIRED', resolved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND expires_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)
